title: Looking for Financial Analyst at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
